places.name: El Ateneo Grand Splendid
places.description: This historic, palatial theater is now one of the world’s most beautiful bookstores.

places.name: La Manzana de las Luces
places.description: A gateway to a mysterious network of underground tunnels.

places.name: Xul Solar Museum
places.description: Xul Solar was an artist of alternate worlds, inventor of languages, and dreamer of utopias.

places.name: Cementerio de la Recoleta
places.description: Buenos Aires' city of the dead contains some very famous remains, including Eva Perón.

places.name: Caminito
places.description: A bright little alley in La Boca is a part of tango history.

places.name: Palacio Barolo
places.description: A tower devoted to — and modeled after — the Divine Comedy.

places.name: El Zanjón de Granados
places.description: Museum housed in underground tunnels that date back to Buenos Aires's earliest settlements.
